title: gcc-toolset-15-binutils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.44-3]
- Avoid using SCL for c10s.

[2.44-2]
- Switch back to using SCL macros.

[2.44-1]
- Initial commit: Import Fedora 42 binutils to GTS-15.  (RHELPLAN-172023) (RHEL-81745)
full_text:
[2.44-3]
- Avoid using SCL for c10s.

[2.44-2]
- Switch back to using SCL macros.

[2.44-1]
- Initial commit: Import Fedora 42 binutils to GTS-15.  (RHELPLAN-172023) (RHEL-81745)
